function A(A)return C[A+(170573-117198)]end for A,J in ipairs({{824078+-824077,-924-(-1467)},{142161+-142160;-645823-(-645958)},{-993792+993928;127271+-126728}})do while J[-439439+439440]<J[304683-304681]do local A=C local J=string.len local z=string.sub local b=string.char local S=table.insert local z=K(A)local b=function(b,S,w,f,U)return J(C,{b;S,w,f,U},A,z)end return b end return(I(7858585-248299,{}))(z(U))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[A(671326-724235)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
